title: tithymalus pilulifer
intro: Tithymalus pilulifer, also known as the "ball-bearing milk thistle", is a perennial plant species within the Euphorbiaceae family, characterized by its distinctive spherical fruit. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to protect the liver from damage and promote its natural healing processes, making it beneficial in treating conditions such as liver disease and jaundice. Tithymalus pilulifer has been traditionally used to support overall health and wellness, offering benefits like improved digestion, enhanced immune function, and antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in various forms, including capsules, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support liver health and overall well-being.
